summary: Comprehensive TLS homepage testing completed successfully. All major sections and functionality working as expected including hero section, navigation, quick actions, news/events, advocate directory, regional offices, join CTA, footer, login flow, and admin dashboard access.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections (Hero, About, Services, News, Events, Directory, Regional Offices, Join CTA, Footer)
Navigation menu links work correctly (About, Services, News, Events, Find Advocate, Verify)
Quick verify stamp functionality navigates to verify page
Member Portal and Find Advocate quick action cards functional
News section displays 4 categorized articles with Urgent badges
Events section shows 3 events with calendar-style display and CLE points
Advocate Directory search functionality works and navigates to verify page
Regional offices display 6 locations with headquarters badge for Dar es Salaam
Join TLS CTA section with benefits display (CLE Access, Digital Stamps, Networking)
Footer contains all 8 required links and complete contact information
Login flow works with admin credentials (admin@tls.or.tz / TLS@Admin2024)
Admin dashboard accessible with statistics and quick actions
Navigation anchor links scroll to correct sections
Live stats bar displays 4 statistics (Advocates, Years of Service, Stamps Verified, Regional Offices)
